text.title: Spring Boot Patterns Examples
text.summary: Worked example: collapse 8 @Value fields into a typed properties record + add ProblemDetail handler.

example.context: Brownfield Boot 3.4; MailService holds 8 @Value fields (host/port/user/pwd/from/maxRetries/timeoutMs/tlsEnabled); MailException currently returns 500 with stack trace.
example.walk: Step 1: inventory → MailProperties record. Step 2: `@ConfigurationProperties("app.mail") @Validated record MailProperties(@NotBlank String host, @Min(1) int port, @NotBlank String user, String pwd, @NotBlank @Email String from, @Min(0) int maxRetries, @Min(100) int timeoutMs, boolean tlsEnabled)`. Step 3: GlobalExceptionHandler maps MailRejectedException → ProblemDetail status=502 type=https://errors.example.com/mail-rejected. Step 4: `@Profile("!prod") MailSender logSender()` for non-prod. Step 5: prod startup fails fast on missing app.mail.host with clear message.
example.output: MailService injects MailProperties record (8 fields → 1 dep); 502 returns RFC 7807 ProblemDetail; non-prod logs emails instead of sending.
